llm_summary: The privacy policy now includes references to Brazil and the Republic of Korea in the same section, indicating that residents of these countries should read the relevant Regional Supplemental Disclosures. Additionally, it specifies that residents of Washington or states with similar consumer health data laws should refer to the Consumer Health Data Privacy Policy if they use third-party health applications with Claude. The section numbers for the supplemental disclosures have been updated for clarity.

modified_paragraphs.after: If you are located in Canada, Brazil, or the Republic of Korea, please read the relevant Regional Supplemental Disclosure which applies to you.
modified_paragraphs.before: If you are located in Canada, please read section 11 of the Privacy Policy which applies to you.

modified_paragraphs.after: If you are located in Washington or a state with similar consumer health data laws, please read our Consumer Health Data Privacy Policy which applies to you if you integrate third party health applications with Claude.
modified_paragraphs.before: If you are located in Brazil, please read section 12 of the Privacy Policy which applies to you.

modified_paragraphs.after: Supplemental Disclosures for Residents of Canada
modified_paragraphs.before: 11. Supplemental Disclosures for Residents of Canada

modified_paragraphs.after: Supplemental Disclosures for Residents of Brazil
modified_paragraphs.before: 12. Supplemental Disclosures for Residents of Brazil

modified_paragraphs.after: Supplemental Disclosures for Residents of the Republic of Korea
modified_paragraphs.before: 13. Supplemental Disclosures for Residents of the Republic of Korea

removed_paragraphs: If you are located in the Republic of Korea, please read section 13 of the Privacy Policy which applies to you.
